name: Portal Freight: Oversized Parcel
description: Ray-cast a linked portal pair onto two chamber walls, align an oversized rigid parcel, then physically push it while its span and velocity are transformed across both coordinate frames.
natural_language: Place BLUE at the Chamber A source and ORANGE at the Chamber B receiver. Deliver the oversized parcel intact.

metadata.notes: Server independently derives each placement ray/wall frame and replays the proper det+1 portal transform, rotated parcel span, transformed velocities, thickness-aware swept aperture checks, split occupancy, and oriented receiver containment.
